page_content:
Tuition Assistance

The Office of Veteran Student Life in the Adele H. Stamp Student Union offers a hub of resources that serves veterans and military connected students, staff, and faculty on campus, with programs including; Veterans- specific New Student Orientation, Transition Assistance, Veteran-focused Career and Networking events, as well as Veteran- centered Campus Events and Programs and a Veteran Center on Campus.

Active Duty military members receiving

For more information: stamp.umd.edu/vets.
